title: Flynt
description: A mod that adds blocks made of flint.
body:
Flynt by Coobik

This mod adds blocks that are made of flint! These blocks are really useful when building, as there are lots of variants: Bricks, Plates, Tiles, etc. Due to their dark color, they add contrast, making your builds fancier and more beautiful.

I was playing with the [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric 'Create Fabric') mod and my mechanism created a lot of excess flint, and after seeing its few use cases i decided to create a mod to add some beautiful blocks to the game.

Huge thanks to the [MCreator](https://mcreator.net 'MCreator') team for creating their fascinating software for making creating mods more accessible. ❤️
